items.name: pipeML
items.description: A flexible and modular machine learning framework designed to support leakage-free model training through custom cross-validation fold construction

items.name: predictive-process-modeling
items.description: Machine learning frameworks for real-time pH/CO2 forecasting and high-dimensional analysis in chemical systems.

items.name: Multiclass-Heart-disease-prediction-using-multimodal-data
items.description: An intelligent multimodal machine learning framework for multiclass heart disease severity prediction using combined clinical and ECG data. The model leverages feature engineering and a Random Forest ensemble to achieve high accuracy and robust performance across five severity levels.

items.name: FinanceCraft
items.description: FinanceCraft is a quantitative framework leveraging technical indicators and machine learning for stock market trend analysis and prediction.  It employs yfinance for data acquisition and Pandas for preprocessing, laying the groundwork for feature engineering, model training, and the implementation of trading algorithms.

items.name: deepchem-benchmark-framework
items.description: Extensible benchmarking framework for molecular machine learning in DeepChem with standardized evaluation and multi-task support.

items.name: EAGLE-Scale
items.description: A cloud auto-scaling framework that combines machine learning prediction, cost optimization, container-VM hybrid management, anomaly detection, and adaptive resource tuning to achieve zero SLA violations at 91% lower cost than existing approaches.

items.name: ML-Integrated-TwoProbeDiFC
items.description: machine learning–integrated framework for diffuse in vivo flow cytometry (DiFC), using a convolutional neural network (CNN) to distinguish circulating tumor cell (CTC) signals from artifacts. The approach leverages both amplitude and temporal peak shape to improve detection accuracy and reduce false positives compared to threshold-based methods.

items.name: pipeline_bulgaria_vecx_ardl
items.description: The pipeline designed for this analysis is a Hybrid Econometric-Machine Learning Framework. It is structured to bridge the gap between classical time-series econometrics (which focuses on theory and long-run relationships) and modern predictive modeling (which focuses on accuracy and handling complex patterns).

items.name: finstream-metaopt
items.description: Implementation of an adaptive machine learning system for non-stationary financial data streams. The framework combines temporally diverse ensemble models with meta-heuristic optimization to dynamically adjust model influence under concept drift.

items.name: CarbonAware_CropPrediction_using_DevOps
items.description: A Carbon-Aware DevOps framework designed to optimize energy efficiency in AI-driven crop yield prediction. This project implements GreenOps principles to minimize the environmental footprint of machine learning pipelines while maintaining high predictive accuracy for sustainable agriculture.

items.name: ML-APT-OCS
items.description: ML-APT: Machine Learning-enhanced Atom ProbeTomography Framework

items.name: Masters-Thesis-Development-of-A-Model-Predictive-Control-Strategy-For-E-Trailers
items.description: This thesis project presents the development of a tractor-independent control strategy for electrically propelled trailers (E-trailers) based on a Nonlinear Model Predictive Control (NMPC) framework augmented with trip-based energy optimization and machine-learning-based tractor behavior estimation.

items.name: ppmi-ontology-alignment
items.description: Framework for aligning longitudinal Parkinson’s Progression Markers Initiative (PPMI) data with the Parkinson’s Disease Ontology (PDON) and Movement Disorder Ontology (PMDO). Provides reproducible mapping, ontology instantiation, and ontology-informed machine learning workflows for analysing Parkinson’s disease trajectories.

items.name: Skin-disease-classification-with-an-ensemble-machine-learning-technique
items.description: his project focuses on enhancing the accuracy and efficiency of skin disease classification by leveraging a lightweight ensemble machine learning framework. The proposed approach combines multiple traditional classifiers—k-Nearest Neighbors (k-NN), Decision Tree (DT), and Gradient Boosting Machine (GBM)

items.name: policyholder-risk-predictions
items.description: Machine learning framework for insurance claim prediction and policyholder risk scoring

items.name: Improved-Molecular-Graph-Aggregation-Strategies-for-Robust-Prediction-of-ADME
items.description: In this study, we present a systematic benchmarking framework to evaluate molecular representation strategies for ADME prediction, comparing classical descriptor-based machine learning models with graph neural network (GNN) architectures implemented within a message passing and aggregation paradigm.

items.name: peptimem
items.description: Two-phase computational framework consisting of causal inference model and residual machine learning classfier for identifying and predicting responders to Alzheimer's Disease treatments

items.name: machinelearning
items.description: ML.NET is an open source and cross-platform machine learning framework for .NET.

items.name: software-cost-estimation-framework
items.description: Hybrid ensemble machine learning and deep learning framework for accurate and explainable software cost estimation.

items.name: ProThermo-T5
items.description: A process-aware machine learning framework (ProtT5-XL + XGBoost) predicting protein thermostability (Tm). It uniquely simulates matrix-induced stability shifts ("Lysis Shock" in cell vs. lysate) to guide the rational design of robust affinity ligands and chromatography resins for downstream processing.

items.name: factor-augmented-inflation-nowcasting-and-forecasting
items.description: Central bank-grade factor-augmented inflation nowcasting and forecasting framework for Zimbabwe. Combines PCA-based macroeconomic factor extraction, machine learning models (Elastic Net, Random Forest, SVR, XGBoost), scenario analysis, and inflation regime classification aligned to SADC targets.

items.name: factor-augmented-inflation-forecasting
items.description: Central bank-grade factor-augmented inflation nowcasting and forecasting framework for Zimbabwe. Combines PCA-based macroeconomic factor extraction, machine learning models (Elastic Net, Random Forest, SVR, XGBoost), scenario analysis, and inflation regime classification aligned to SADC targets.

items.name: RZSM-Loess-Plateau
items.description: Code and data for A Machine Learning Framework for Estimating Multi-Layer Root Zone Soil Moisture on the Loess Plateau Using Bias-Corrected ERA5-Land Reanalysis Data

items.name: An-AI-Driven-Digital-Transformation-Skills-Framework
items.description: Machine learning analysis for the AI-Driven Digital Transformation Skills Framework, including text preprocessing, skill extraction, topic modeling (LDA), and clustering (K-means and hierarchical clustering).

items.name: neural_networks_from_scratch
items.description: 🚀 A deep dive into the mathematical core of Machine Learning. Purely NumPy-based implementations of Neural Networks (MLPs) and Gradient Descent from scratch. Features an MNIST Handwritten Digit Classifier achieving ~90% accuracy without high-level frameworks like TensorFlow/PyTorch. 🧠💡

items.name: JNet
items.description: JNet is a Java machine learning framework consisting of tools and libraries for building and running neural networks and machine learning models through built-in APIs. Just like previous frameworks, it is a great place to get your hands dirty and experiment with the guts of a model directly!

items.name: URLsDetection
items.description: Machine Learning-Based Classification Framework for Detecting Fraudulent Cryptocurrency Platforms using URL and Domain Intelligence: Using CryptoScamDB & PhiUSIIL

items.name: Machine_learning-2FA-Device-Trustscore-Auth
items.description: A security framework integrating a Random Forest machine learning model and 2FA via a Flask REST API to enhance device authentication.

items.name: graph_schemes
items.description: Fuzzy machine learning framework

items.name: Integrated-Risk-Assessment-Windfarm
items.description: A machine learning and SHAP-based framework for integrated risk assessment in wind farm clusters.

items.name: LLM
items.description: LLM implementations with AIX machine learning framework.

items.name: MLOps-Deployment-Framework
items.description: A robust and scalable MLOps deployment framework designed to streamline the continuous integration, delivery, and deployment of machine learning models.

items.name: startup-scalability-ml
items.description: Machine Learning pipeline (Random Forest, XGBoost, Stacking) and SHAP explainability framework used to identify structural growth barriers for startups. Code for my academic research paper.

items.name: PhiFlow
items.description: A differentiable PDE solving framework for machine learning

items.name: x-tweet
items.description: X-Tweet is a full-stack web application for analyzing real-time Twitter trends using NLP and machine learning. It provides insights through sentiment analysis, topic modeling, anomaly detection, influencer tracking, bot detection, and more. Built with Vue.js, Django REST Framework, PostgreSQL, and Chart.js.

items.name: AURA-PoC
items.description: AURA – Dual-model machine learning framework for customer churn risk classification and lead-time prediction in cloud services, implemented with XGBoost, FastAPI, and Streamlit.

items.name: pennylane-qrack
items.description: The PennyLane-Qrack plugin integrates the Qrack quantum computing framework with PennyLane's quantum machine learning capabilities.

items.name: Quantification-A

items.name: mlx-omni-server
items.description: A high-performance, local inference server powered by Apple's MLX framework. This solution is specifically designed for efficient model inference on Apple Silicon (M-series) chips, providing an OpenAI-compatible API for various machine learning models.

items.name: Early-Warning-System-EWS-for-Financial-Stress
items.description: Machine Learning Framework for Bank Portfolio Risk Monitoring

items.name: MD-Simulations
items.description: A Generalizable Machine Learning Interatomic Potential (MLIP) framework for accelerated Molecular Dynamics. Implementing High-Dimensional Neural Network Potentials (HDNNP) using SchNetPack to predict multi-target atomic energies and electrostatics.

items.name: Projeto-Ataques-de-Inferencia-Machine-Learning
items.description: Framework experimental para analisar o trade-off entre Privacidade Diferencial, utilidade dos dados e risco de vazamento. Avalia o impacto de diferentes valores de ε usando modelos simples de ML e ataques de inferência. Consome datasets já privatizados por pipeline externo.

items.name: analogOS
items.description: analogOS é um framework que formaliza analogia como primitiva computacional. Não é machine learning. Não é apenas abstração. É uma álgebra de sistemas baseada em operadores universais reutilizáveis.

items.name: Marshal-s-YDTA-AI-and-ML-

items.name: Prompt_injection_detection
items.description: A security framework for Hinglish chatbots that detects and prevents prompt injection attacks using rule-based and machine learning methods. It preprocesses code-mixed text, identifies malicious inputs, and ensures safe, reliable, and real-time AI interactions in bilingual environments.

items.name: predicting-engagement-success-ml
items.description: Machine learning project that predicts social media engagement success using early persuasion signals, influencer authority, and algorithmic amplification in a two-stage framework.

items.description: Hands-on implementations of machine learning and AI concepts, including experiments with Python, R, and frameworks. Designed for learning, prototyping, and sharing practical examples.

items.description: Machine Learning-based Network Intrusion Detection System using CICIDS2017 dataset with high accuracy classification of benign and malicious traffic using Random Forest, XGBoost, and Isolation Forest.

items.name: Multimodal-Tourism-Satisfaction-Analysis
items.description: A multimodal machine learning framework for tourism satisfaction prediction using BERT, ResNet, and DDA-optimized CatBoost with feature fusion and interpretability analysis.

items.name: jasmine
items.description: This C++ machine learning framework uses concepts, templates, and expression templates for efficient, modular neural network development. It supports matrix operations, layers (e.g., `weight_net_t`, `sigmoid_net_t`), optimizers (SGD, Adam, Nadam), and initialization methods (Xavier, He). Designed for performance and extensibility.

items.name: enterprise-fintech-mlops-architecture
items.description: A high-level architectural framework and best practices for scaling Machine Learning operations in a hyper-growth FinTech environment.

items.name: ganesh
items.description: This repository presents ML-DTRM, a Machine Learning–Enhanced Dynamic Threshold Resource Management framework designed for fog computing environments. The proposed system integrates LSTM-based time-series workload prediction with dynamic threshold-based scheduling to enable proactive resource allocation.

items.name: opifex
items.description: A unified scientific machine learning framework built on JAX/Flax NNX

items.name: PriceForecasting
items.description: This repository provides a machine learning and econometric framework to forecast Bangladesh's regional wheat flour prices through 2030. Integrating predictive modeling with rigorous econometrics, it tackles supply disruptions and inflation to provide vital insights for food security, policy-making, and long-term economic stability.

items.name: matbench-discovery
items.description: An evaluation framework for machine learning models simulating high-throughput materials discovery.

items.description: The main objective is to generate accurate predictions and the extract meaningful insights from the dataset.

items.description: Causal machine learning framework to predict antidepressant treatment response and estimate individualized treatment effects using NHANES data. Goal is to support clinicians by identifying treatment with lowest depression risk, while also providing explainability features to the machine learning process.

items.name: sundial
items.description: Workflow / framework for machine learning with data sourced from Google Earth Engine on a bare metal machine.

items.name: Stock-Return-Prediction-using-Machine-Learning
items.description: A machine learning project that predicts next-day stock returns using financial time-series data and technical indicators. The study compares linear, kernel-based, and ensemble models (OLS, SVR, Random Forest) under a time-series-aware evaluation framework.

items.name: Modelagem-Preditiva-de-Customer-Churn-SEMMA
items.description: Previsão de Churn em Telecomunicações utilizando o Framework SEMMA. Implementação de modelos de Machine Learning com foco em otimização de métricas de retenção e redução de CAC. ROC-AUC: 0.8395.

items.description: The proposed system introduces an intelligent, data-driven framework that uses machine learning techniques to predict failures and optimize the energy efficiency of air-cooled chillers. It aims to overcome the limitations of conventional maintenance practices by providing real-time insights and predictive analytics based on historical sensor data.

By leveraging Machine Learning and Time-Series Analysis, it forecasts requirements with high precision, mitigating the "bullwhip effect" and optimizing global supply chain margins.
